required_tail_obligation.name: adjacent_recurrence_with_geometric_remainder
quantifiers: every admissible periodic Fourier state u
required_tail_obligation.statement: A(K,n+1) <= rho*A(K,n) + r(K,n), rho < 1, r(K,n) <= Cr*theta^n*Envelope(K,u), theta < 1

required_tail_obligation.name: periodic_far_high_sobolev_paraproduct_tail
quantifiers: every u in H^s with s>5/2
required_tail_obligation.statement: sum_{j>=K+R} 2^(5j/2)||P_j u||_2 <= Cs*2^{-(s-5/2)R}||u||_{H^s}, with the full paraproduct constant <=1/8 at R=8

required_tail_obligation.name: periodic_far_low_commutator_tail
required_tail_obligation.statement: |m_K(k)-m_K(q)| <= Cm*2^-K*|p| and the induced commutator constant at R=8 is <=1/8

required_tail_obligation.name: near_triad_uniform_tail_majorant
quantifiers: every admissible u and tangent h

required_tail_obligation.name: official_data_coverage
quantifiers: every smooth divergence-free finite-energy initial datum
required_tail_obligation.statement: zero data are globally smooth; every nonzero trajectory either enters a normalized/adaptive compact-Gamma chart with controlled switching or satisfies a direct BKM continuation criterion
